name: headline-variations
description: Generate 20 headline variations across five proven frameworks — curiosity, benefit, how-to, listicle, and question — for split-testing and content ideation.
input_description: Topic, product, or core message you want to headline, target audience, and the primary emotion or desire to trigger (fear, curiosity, greed, aspiration, urgency).
output_description: 20 headlines organized into 5 groups of 4 (Curiosity, Benefit-Led, How-To, Listicle, Question), each group with a brief framework explanation and copywriting notes on what makes each headline work.
